stat.title: Reached on Error Merchants
stat.subtitle: Plate appearances where the batter reached on a fielding error.

notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Nolan Schanuel, assist to third baseman Denzer Guzman.
